name: §2.26 example template declares all five required fields (grounding_sources, refusal_template, per_turn_cost_target, audit_log, safety_classifier_hook)
command: for k in 'grounding_sources:' 'refusal_template:' 'per_turn_cost_target:' 'audit_log:' 'safety_classifier_hook:'; do grep -q "^$k" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_customer/example-product-helper.md" || exit 1; done; echo all_five 1>&2
